goal: Classify ordinary prompts through a guarded FIM route policy and only emit a fim-complete command for explicit single-file line-range edits.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- deepseek fim-route --input 'complete src/deepseek.rs lines 1-3' --json
cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: FIM request and apply commands can work manually while ordinary prompts have no deterministic policy layer deciding when FIM is safe versus when the normal agent loop should handle the task.
